overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game resembling Red Dead Redemption 2, showing a character walking through a rural Southern American landscape. The scene transitions from a plantation house garden with Spanish moss-draped oak trees to open fields and finally to a dirt road alongside a cemetery wall under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: plantation house garden with live oak trees

agents.ego_description: walking along a wooden fence line toward a large house with green roof

entered.detail: two-story traditional wooden house with green roof and white trim
massive live oak tree with hanging Spanish moss
ornate wooden fence lining the garden path
bush with pink flowers in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a garden path beside a wooden fence, with a large traditional house visible on the left and a massive oak tree draped in Spanish moss on the right. The setting is a shaded, overgrown garden with dense vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy field approaching dirt road

events.description: exiting the shaded garden area into open field

agents.ego_description: walking through open grass toward a dirt road visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: group of people walking across the field in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving past the house and fence, the scene opens into a wide grassy field under an overcast sky. The large oak tree recedes to the left as distant figures walk across the field ahead, and a dirt road becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt road alongside cemetery wall

events.description: transitioning from grassy field onto dirt road
passing a stationary horse-drawn wagon on the left roadside

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt road next to a stone cemetery wall

notable_agents.action: stationary horse-drawn wagon parked on the roadside
person walking along the road in the opposite direction

entered.detail: unpaved dirt road with visible tire tracks
low stone wall enclosing a cemetery with visible headstones
overhead electrical wires stretching across the road
telegraph pole with crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto a dirt road flanked by a stone cemetery wall on the left and open land on the right. Overhead power lines run parallel to the road as the camera passes a stationary wagon and approaches a distant figure walking toward it.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, shaded garden into an expansive rural landscape under an overcast sky. It begins along a garden path beside a wooden fence, passing a traditional house and a massive oak tree draped in Spanish moss. As the camera moves past the house, the dense vegetation recedes and the scene opens into a wide grassy field where distant figures walk toward a far-off dirt road. The movement then shifts onto the road itself, flanked by a stone cemetery wall and overhead power lines, before passing a stationary wagon and approaching a figure in the distance.
